Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); const vk = si.siVk; console.log\('VK path:', vk.path.substring\(0,80\)\); console.log\('VK hex:', vk.hex\);")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.match\(/yandex/i\)\); console.log\(keys\); if\(keys.length\) { const y = si[keys[0]]; console.log\('hex:', y.hex\); console.log\('path start:', y.path.substring\(0,100\)\); }")
Bash(node -e "const {siVk} = require\('simple-icons'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({path: siVk.path, hex: siVk.hex}\)\)")
